title: python-blivet bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.10.0-23.0.1]
- Replace all upstream bugzilla references
- [Orabug: 34721767], [Orabug: 29870386], [Orabug: 32114602]
- Load libblockdev btrfs plugin under UEK to support btrfs in installer
  [Orabug: 30792917]

[3.10.0-23]
- Add a pre-wipe fixup function for LVM logical volumes
  Resolves: RHEL-93966

[3.10.0-22]
- tests: Change expected Stratis metadata size for stratisd 3.7.0
  Resolves: RHEL-102299

[3.10.0-21]
- Tell LVM DBus to refresh it's internal status during reset
  Resolves: RHEL-93967

[3.10.0-20]
- Wipe end partition before creating it as well as the start
  Resolves: RHEL-93967

[3.10.0-19]
- Make ActionDestroyFormat optional when the device is also scheduled to be removed
  Resolves: RHEL-84685
  Resolves: RHEL-84663

[3.10.0-18]
- Get the actual PV format size for LVMPV format
  Resolves: RHEL-74076
- Include additional information in PartitioningError
  Resolves: RHEL-84686

[3.10.0-17]
- Do not remove PVs from devices file if disabled or doesn't exist
  Resolves: RHEL-65846
- iscsi: Use node.startup=onboot option for Login
  Resolves: RHEL-53719
- tests: Make sure selinux_test doesn't try to create mountpoints
  Resolves: RHEL-78988
full_text:
[3.10.0-23.0.1]
- Replace all upstream bugzilla references
- [Orabug: 34721767], [Orabug: 29870386], [Orabug: 32114602]
- Load libblockdev btrfs plugin under UEK to support btrfs in installer
  [Orabug: 30792917]

[3.10.0-23]
- Add a pre-wipe fixup function for LVM logical volumes
  Resolves: RHEL-93966

[3.10.0-22]
- tests: Change expected Stratis metadata size for stratisd 3.7.0
  Resolves: RHEL-102299

[3.10.0-21]
- Tell LVM DBus to refresh it's internal status during reset
  Resolves: RHEL-93967

[3.10.0-20]
- Wipe end partition before creating it as well as the start
  Resolves: RHEL-93967

[3.10.0-19]
- Make ActionDestroyFormat optional when the device is also scheduled to be removed
  Resolves: RHEL-84685
  Resolves: RHEL-84663

[3.10.0-18]
- Get the actual PV format size for LVMPV format
  Resolves: RHEL-74076
- Include additional information in PartitioningError
  Resolves: RHEL-84686

[3.10.0-17]
- Do not remove PVs from devices file if disabled or doesn't exist
  Resolves: RHEL-65846
- iscsi: Use node.startup=onboot option for Login
  Resolves: RHEL-53719
- tests: Make sure selinux_test doesn't try to create mountpoints
  Resolves: RHEL-78988

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20315-0.html
